channel.title: AISight — AI Capital Expenditure Tracker
channel.description: Latest news and data on AI infrastructure spending across 38 companies. Updated 3x daily from SEC filings and earnings calls.

item.title: OpenAI’s $122B “VC Round” Is Vendor Deals, Contingent Capital, and a Guaranteed Return It Arguably Can’t Afford
item.description: The three anchors are a cloud vendor, a chip vendor, and a holding company with a circular revenue deal. The actual VC-style capital is a fraction of the headline. OpenAI closed $122 billion at an $852 billion post-money valuation on March 31, 2026. But it’s … [OpenAI]

item.title: Data Center Chip Market worth $687.65 billion by 2032 - Exclusive Report by MarketsandMarkets™
item.description: DELRAY BEACH, Fla., April 6, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- According to MarketsandMarkets™, the Data Center Chip Market is expected to reach USD 687.65 billion by 2032 from USD 283.16 billion in 2026, registering a CAGR of 15.9% during the forecast period. Browse 170 …

item.title: From Passive To Purposeful: How AI Is Reshaping Corporate Learning Strategies In 2026
item.description: Most organizations invest heavily in corporate training—yet learning rarely translates into measurable performance change. In 2026, AI is giving L&D professionals the tools to fix that: personalized learning paths, intelligent content support, predictive anal… [Intel]

item.title: Q-Factor emerges with $24M in funding and the next big bet to achieve quantum computing advantage
item.description: Tel Aviv-based quantum computing startup Q-Factor announced itself to the world today after closing on a $24 million seed funding round. The company’s mission is to develop a neutral atom-based quantum computer that can scale to one million qubits and beyond.…
